summary: Plan-only review of five independent open PRs. #66685 is routed to central security handling because the validator identified it as security-sensitive. The remaining four PRs do not have complete merge preflight: #66150 and #66257 are waiting on author, #66174 has failing checks, and #66478 lacks resolved review-bot/Codex preflight proof.

actions.reason: Active author-followup state and unresolved review-bot proof block an auditable merge recommendation in plan mode.
Failing checks and active waiting-on-author state block merge and require maintainer/author follow-up before any repair or merge path is auditable.
The PR appears narrow and promising, but the waiting-on-author label and missing merge preflight proof block an automated merge recommendation.
Message-delivery risk, medium diff size, and missing resolved review-bot/Codex preflight proof require maintainer review before merge or repair finalization.
Security-sensitive PR is read-only and out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope; route the exact item to central OpenClaw security handling.
